name: increase-resolution
description: Bria Increase resolution upscales the resolution of any image. It increases resolution using a dedicated upscaling method that preserves the original image content without regeneration.

desired_increase.description: Resolution multiplier (scale factor). Possible values are 2 or 4. Maximum total area is 8192x8192 pixels
desired_increase.title: desired_increase

preserve_alpha.description: Preserve alpha channel in output. When true, maintains original transparency. When false, output is fully opaque.
preserve_alpha.title: Preserve Alpha
